title: Missing checklist on updates sent to MS Teams
excerpt:
We’re using the monday to MS Teams integration to send updates to a MS Teams channel which on the whole works fine, but if the Monday.com update includes a checklist, this doesn’t show in MS Teams. 
Is there a known solu…

posts.author: RajeevD (Rajeev)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re using the monday to MS Teams integration to send updates to a MS Teams channel which on the whole works fine, but if the Monday.com update includes a checklist, this doesn’t show in MS Teams.

Is there a known solution/workaround for this?

Thanks!
